description: Combined provider interop contract. This fixture pins warnings, provenance, and artifacts without introducing provider-specific wrapper envelopes.

warnings.message: Provider tool allow-list preserved as metadata; clew v0.1 does not execute tools.
Unknown claude fields preserved under extensions.claude: risk_level

artifacts.contents:

Preserve operational meaning across providers.

Preserve intent and report degradation.

warnings.message: Provider export does not encode clew inheritance; compose first if parent policies must be inlined.
Required runtime capabilities are preserved by clew but are advisory in provider exports.
